body.title: pe: Seed SITUATE node — tier.2 finds files from ticket description
body.result: SITUATE step added to pe_chain.py: fast path uses ticket required_files, slow path calls tier.2 Ollama + _parse_file_list fallback. Chain now ENTRY→CLAIM→READ_TICKET→SITUATE. 32 tests.
body.description: Tier.2 call: given basket[ticket_description], emit basket[plan_files] (list of file paths). Uses L3 SITUATE template with code_ref=situate_files tool. Tests: plan_files is non-empty list for a sample ticket.
